def: Such a number of the officers or members of any body as iscompetent by law or constitution to transact business; as, a quorumof the House of Representatives; a constitutional quorum was notpresent.
Art of writing or engraving on glass.
The act of deposing from office; a removal from the throne.Fox.
A tumor made up of a gelatinous tissue resembling that found inthe umbilical cord.
That department of physics which treats of the atmosphere.
Having an honest heart; free from duplicity.-- Sin"gle-heart"ed*ly, adv.
A group of Protozoa having both flagella and pseudopodia.
The state of being a pauper; the state of indigent personsrequiring support from the community. Whatly.
Government by new or inexperienced hands; upstart rule; raw oruntried officials.

The name of several species of herons which bear plumes on theback. They are generally white. Among the best known species are theAmerican egret (Ardea, or Herodias, egretta); the great egret (A.alba); the little egret (A. garzetta), of Europe; and the Americansnowy egret (A. candidissima).A bunch of egrets killed for their plumage. G. W. Cable.
An extinct order of sea urchins found in the Paleozoic rocks.They had more than twenty vertical rows of plates. Called alsoPalæechini. [Written also Palæechinoidea.]
